description_long: This house is a large, multi-structure residential property with several interconnected buildings and a spacious outdoor area. The main building features two stories with a flat roof and multiple window arrangements, while an adjacent structure has a pitched roof. The property includes a circular water tank, palm trees, and various outdoor amenities such as a patio, seating areas, and a pergola. The exterior is predominantly light-colored, with some darker roofing elements and visible architectural details like columns and railings. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, and the entryway is marked by a covered porch with steps and decorative columns. The overall layout suggests a blend of modern and traditional architectural influences, suitable for a suburban or urban neighborhood.
description: A large, multi-building house with flat and pitched roofs, light exterior walls, and extensive outdoor amenities including a water tank, patio, and palm trees. Features include multiple stories, varied window arrangements, and a prominent covered entryway.
description_view_0: Front and right side of the house, showing the main entryway, circular water tank, patio, and palm trees.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the pitched-roof structure, outdoor seating, and the connection between buildings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the main building, flat roof sections, and rooftop details.
description_view_3: Left side and rear, showing the outdoor amenities, water tank, and the relationship between the main and secondary structures.
attribute_roof_type: flat with gable and hip combinations
attribute_window_arrangement: mixed symmetrical and asymmetrical placement with standard and large windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, decorative columns, and a prominent main door
